text: 英語聽力模擬誓題 14.
第一節
聽下面五段對話
每段對話後有一個小題
從題中所給的
A, B, C 三個選項中選出最佳選項
聽完每段對話後
你都有十秒鐘的時間
來回答有關小題和閱讀像小題
每段對話盡讀一遍
現在
你有五秒鐘的時間
閱讀第一小題的有關內容
How far is the service area
踢進了我們的家庭
前面我們離開了
真瘋狂
I need to grab something to eat
It's still far away
We've only been on the road for ten minutes
The movie you've been longing to see
is finally showing in theaters
Let's watch it tonight
How about tomorrow
I just came back from my business trip
I planned to catch up on my sleep
Where would you recommend for dinner
I'm not familiar with this area
There's a great Italian restaurant
just a block away
You could also check out the new shopping mall
which has many types of restaurants
And as job performance is streets ahead
Yeah
She always works hard to get everything done
The wonder all our colleagues have positive opinions of her
What are your goals in taking this class
I want to lose weight to fit into my wedding dress
Got it
I'll take your measurements before I draw up a workout plan for you
Lili
Lili, your exam results really surprised me
Thanks
The grades were as expected
All my hard work paid off
Remember that you were too anxious to sleep well before the exams
Yeah
I couldn't stop worrying
What if I made some careless mistakes
Or what if I couldn't finish the test papers
You should trust yourself as you always make full preparation
And remember to seek support from others when needed
I'll always be here

Tina, I've told you that my parents are coming from China to celebrate this spring festival with us
Our family dinner is on Friday
Will your entire family be able to attend?
Today is Thursday
I informed them two days ago
This is the first time we celebrate the spring festival together after we got married
They're really excited
My sister, Chandra, will come with her whole family
My cousin, Krista, might be a bit late on that day
Because she has to pick up the kids first
What about Krista's husband?
Oh, Drew had a major operation recently
So I don't think he'll be able to come

Oh, Drew had a major operation recently
So I don't think he'll be able to come
It's already 6 pm
Let's call it a day
Your place is on my way home
Do you need a lift?
Thanks, but I need to go to night school
Go to night school after a full day's work
What made you decide to do that?
Well, night school is a great place to acquire new skills
One of my friends takes classes
to keep up with the latest job requirements
As for me, learning something is definitely better than wasting time watching short videos at home
Before going to night school, I always felt that my life was boring and empty
I see, what class are you taking?
I'm taking a baking class right now
There are a variety of options
Like calligraphy and traditional Chinese painting
And I might take a foreign language class after I finish this
How often do you have classes?
Every Tuesday and Friday
The class starts at 7 pm and lasts for one and a half hours
It usually takes me about half an hour to get home after school
Sounds great, I should probably find something like that for myself too

As for me, learning something is definitely better than wasting time

In today's program, I have the pleasure of chatting with Sandra, a Brazilian photographer
whose works have been exhibited in America and Britain
Welcome Sandra
Thanks for having me
You didn't turn to photography until you were 60
Can you tell us how you got into photography?
I discovered photography by chance
My daughter took me to my first photography class
as a present for my birthday in 2013
After the class, I decided to continue studying it
I enjoy capturing the lives of people from all walks of life with my camera
and sharing their experiences
That's inspiring
Well, when looking at your works, I've noticed that you prefer to create images
in which the features of the subjects do not reveal themselves easily at first sight
Why do you create pictures in such a way?
I believe that not having everything presented clearly allows viewers to use their imagination
and give their own meaning to the images

The smell of freshly roasted coffee filled the air inside a stone house
in the eastern Chinese village that houses Fred Sturzer's Cafe, Bamboo Coffee Roasters
After more than 20 years as an engineer in the automobile industry,
Sturzer has found a new calling and fulfillment
in the village of Maoli near Ningbao in Jujang Province
Inspired by his lifelong love of coffee,
Sturzer turned what had been a hobby into a promising business
The cafe is near the village entrance and was once a warehouse
Sturzer spent a year repairing it and introduced modern coffee roasting equipment
I also received a lot of support from both my family and the village council
He says adding that the council offered a much lower rent to him
Since opening in June 2024, Bamboo Coffee Roasters has quickly become a popular destination
attracting visitors from near and far
Residents have observed a positive impact
Neighboring shops report increased business
with visitors frequently purchasing snacks and local produce
Products such as honey oranges, bamboo shoots and tea
have also found wider markets thanks to the cafe's popularity
I want more people to experience the charm of Chinese villages through my coffee business
Sturzer says
